properties.body:
[Southern Baltic] GERMAN NAV WARN 403/26
SOUTHERN BALTIC. NORTHEAST OF RUEGEN
EXPLOSIVES FOUND ALONG THE JOININGLINES:
1. 54-49,5N 013-55,4E,
54-54,6N 013-53,8E AND
54-53,4N 013-47,3E.
2. 54-35,3N 013-49,2E,
54-28,3N 013-50,9E AND
54-21,7N 013-51,0E.
ANCHORING AND FISHING PROHIBITED WITHIN
A RADIUS OF 100 METRES.
CANCEL GERMAN NAVIGATIONAL WARNING 398/26
